stemHtml:
During dispatch, you perform the Mass and Balance calculations. Given the following information, calculate the Take-Off Mass CG in Inches aft of the datum.

Basic Empty Mass: 2 635 lb
Basic Empty Mass Moment: 204 397.5 in.lb
Front Seat Occupant's Mass: 93 lb
Front Seat Occupant's Arm: 78 in
Aft Seat Occupant's Mass: 186 lb
Aft Seat Occupant's Arm: 119 in
Block Fuel: 850 lb
Taxi Fuel: 320 lb
Fuel Arm: 83 in
